source_pr.title: plan: covert max/min to topN.
source_pr.body:
To make #5105 correct, we need to hold the aggregation operator. And add a `is not null` filter.
Since if there's no data, we should return `NULL` instead of empty.
If there's both not NULL data and NULLs, we should ignore the NULLs.
fix #1638

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR adds an optimizer rule to convert MAX/MIN aggregation to TopN (Limit+Sort) and introduces new logical plan tests. The patch does not include a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization change for an intermittent test failure, so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: files: plan/aggregation_eliminate.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, plan/max_min_eliminate.go, plan/task.go
